title: Remove outer box/square background from logo image

requirements.text: Update all logo usages across the app (Header, Hero, Footer) so the logo is displayed without any surrounding dark square/box background — the circular badge should appear directly on whatever background sits behind it, with no rectangular container or box shape visible.

quotes: remove the box from the logo

acceptanceCriteria: The dark square/rectangular box that frames the circular KopdeGoa logo badge is no longer visible anywhere in the app.
The circular logo badge (beer mug with 'KOP DE GOA' text) renders cleanly against the Header, Hero, and Footer backgrounds.
No white or dark rectangular bounding box appears around the logo in any section or screen size.
The logo retains its circular badge shape with the red border, yellow glow, and beer mug illustration intact.

constraints: Do not alter the circular badge design, colors, or illustration inside the logo.
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths.
nonGoals: Redesigning the logo shape or brand identity.
Changing logo sizing or placement in the layout.

required: Circular badge logo with 'KOP DE GOA' text arc at the top, a yellow/golden sun glow background, a dark navy blue beer mug with foam in the center, a red outer ring border, and a white inner ring — the entire image must have a fully transparent background with no square or rectangular box (kopdeGoa-logo.dim_300x300.png)
